title: Clifftop Three-Bedroom Ocean-View Villa with Mezzanine and Sea-Facing Pool
blurb: A three-bedroom clifftop retreat above Sandy Bay on Nusa Lembongan, where open ocean fills every room, a 15-metre pool edges the garden, and sea-facing indoor and outdoor dining rooms sit a short stroll from the sand and cafés below.
detail:
Set on the rugged cliff edge, this three-bedroom villa spreads across two levels with a mezzanine that doubles as a fourth sleeping space or a quiet lounge. The three ground-floor rooms each open to ocean, garden or pool, all with king beds and en-suite baths, while the master looks straight out to water and the Balinese mountains beyond. Interiors carry a cool coastal palette drawn from the surrounding green and turquoise.

Days gather around the 15-metre pool and the ocean-facing garden, where yoga mats can be rolled out to the sound of waves against the cliff. The enclosed living room sits beside an open kitchen and dining area, and a mezzanine swing chair, smart television, books and board games keep the group happily occupied. A clifftop dining terrace and shaded poolside seating extend the space outdoors.

Breakfast comes daily, served by an attentive resident team that also handles housekeeping and security. A private chef can be arranged for floating breakfasts, lunches and dinners tailored to any diet, or guests can wander down to the toe-in-the-sand cafés and beach clubs just around Sandy Bay. It suits a family or small group looking for seclusion within easy reach of the shore.
